name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Irving's Cash America Pawn on E Irving Blvd delivers fast pawn loans and gold buying in Irving, TX.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn operates at 931 E Irving Blvd in Irving, TX, as a standalone storefront dedicated to pawn loans and collateral-based cash advances. This Irving location serves the local community with flexible lending options for customers who need immediate funds. The store maintains convenient hours: Monday–Friday 9 AM–7 PM, Saturday 9 AM–6 PM, and Sunday 11 AM–4 PM.

At the Irving location, Cash America Pawn accepts a variety of items as collateral including jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and gold. Customers can reach the store at +1 972-721-9931 to discuss pawn options, get estimates, or inquire about buying gold and silver. The professional staff evaluates items quickly and works to provide fair market valuations.

Irving residents looking for fast cash without a credit check find pawn loans useful for temporary financial needs. Bring a valid photo ID and the item you want to pawn; appraisals are free, and the process is straightforward. Cash America Pawn is a trusted local option for quick, no-credit lending in Irving.
pros: 3,300+ physical retail locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provide widespread convenience and accessibility
No credit check required for pawn loans—serves cash and credit-constrained consumers excluded from traditional lending
Immediate cash payment on spot for items sold or pawned, with same-visit funding for emergency cash needs
Diversified merchandise buying (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods) provides flexible collateral options
Layaway service offers installment purchasing with only 10% down, providing credit-free alternative to financing
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicates financial stability and regulatory oversight
AFF subsidiary network of 15,000+ merchant partners extends lease-to-own and retail finance options beyond pawn stores
cons: Pawn loans carry interest rates and fees that can be significantly higher than traditional personal loans or credit products
Pledged items must be retrieved within the loan term or are forfeited and sold, creating strict repayment deadlines without grace periods
Retail merchandise markups are typical of pawn operations, meaning items resold are priced higher than wholesale or original value
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no credit building or reporting to credit bureaus, so borrowing does not improve credit scores
International and Latin American operations may carry currency, regulatory, and operational complexity not transparent to U.S. consumers
best_for: Consumers with urgent cash needs and limited access to credit who need same-day funding without credit checks
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who prefer short-term loans over permanent sale
Unbanked or underbanked consumers in areas with limited traditional financial services seeking alternative lending
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate emergency cash who have valuable items to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans, while accessible without credit checks, carry interest rates and strict redemption terms that make them an expensive short-term solution—best used for genuine emergencies rather than ongoing financial needs.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse terms
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying for immediate cash
Layaway service with 10% down payment and installment terms
Used merchandise inventory and in-store shopping
Store locator tool to find nearest FirstCash location
AFF lease-to-own payment solutions through 15,000+ retail merchant partners
Retail finance payment plans through AFF subsidiary
Item appraisal and cash valuation on the spot
Online inventory browsing and location information
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 931 E Irving Blvd, Irving, TX. Fast pawn loans with no credit check.
